name: kb_miss_driving_license
description: User asks about driving license, which is explicitly NOT in the KB (per the KB-coverage list). bhAI must acknowledge it doesn't have the info, NOT invent documents/centre/fee, NOT claim it'll ask Vijay or anyone.
trigger_source: Class of failure called out by prompt line 215 (Know what's in your KB and what isn't); related to Sapna karate failure pattern.

turns.content: Mujhe driving license banwana hai, kya kya documents lagenge aur kahaan jaana hai?

judge_criterion: Driving license is NOT in bhAI's KB (per the prompt's explicit list: Aadhaar, PAN, Voter ID, Ration card, Marriage cert, ESIC + 9 yojanas — no driving license). bhAI must (1) honestly say it doesn't have this in its KB, (2) NOT fabricate a documents list, fee, or RTO address from general training knowledge — even with hedging, these specifics are forbidden for KB-scope topics, (3) offer the consent-gated ESCALATE: true escalation OR direct the user to the relevant authority (RTO) without naming a specific RTO branch. Must NOT claim it'll ask Vijay or any team member.
